detailed_description: The image shows a vibrant mountain valley with a small stream flowing over rocks in the midground. Lush green hillsides rise on both sides, dotted with trees, flowering shrubs, and yellow wildflowers. A prominent flowering shrub with white blooms is visible in the left midground. The sky is overcast with thick clouds, and distant mountains are partially obscured by mist. The foreground is dense with tall grasses and plants.

dynamic_potential.notes: Water flow and cloud movement suggest moderate dynamic potential

framing_risks.description: Truncating the stream path would remove key dynamic element
Dense foliage in foreground may obscure stream details
Hillsides near edges may be cut if frame is too narrow

generation_risks.description: Tall grasses and plants may appear to sway unnaturally
White water over rocks may flicker or change shape
Overcast conditions may cause inconsistent lighting in video
Static terrain like rocks may appear to move due to camera motion
